hero.subtext: Over 30 years delivering crane, transport, and heavy equipment solutions across Guatemala.

services.headline: OUR SERVICES
services.subtext: Certified equipment, specialized operators, and full coverage across Guatemala.
services.cranes_rent_desc: Fleet of telescopic and lattice cranes up to 115 tons for any type of project.
services.cranes_sale_desc: Acquire certified heavy machinery with technical support and financing available.
services.forklifts_desc: Lifting solutions for warehouses, ports and industry with certified operators.
services.machinery_desc: Excavators, compactors and construction equipment available for rent and sale.
services.transport_desc: Flatbed trucks and lowboys for oversized cargo transport nationwide.
services.roadside_desc: 24-hour rescue and roadside assistance service along the Atlantic Highway.

about.headline: SINCE
about.p1: Grúas Vargas S.A. was founded on Guatemala's Atlantic Highway with one mission: to deliver reliable lifting solutions for the country's most demanding projects.
about.p2: Today we operate a fleet of over 9 cranes up to 115 tons, forklifts, heavy machinery and specialized transport trucks — backed by over three decades of field experience.

why.headline: TRUST IN EVERY PROJECT
why.subtext: Three decades of field work back us up.
why.cert_desc: All units with preventive maintenance, current certifications and full insurance coverage.
why.ops_desc: Experienced personnel certified to operate on industrial and construction projects.
why.hours_desc: Available around the clock for emergencies, roadside rescues and tight-deadline projects.
why.coverage_desc: Three strategic bases in Zacapa, Izabal and Petén covering the full Atlantic Route.

cta.headline: READY FOR YOUR NEXT PROJECT?
cta.subtext: No-commitment quotes. We respond in under 2 hours.

footer.tagline: Crane, transport, and heavy equipment solutions across Guatemala since 1990.
